name: Melt-Away Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Cream butter until light and fluffy using an electric mixer. Gradually add powdered sugar, beating at medium speed. Add flour, mixing well. Stir in vanilla extract, almond extract, and food coloring if desired.
Use a cookie gun to shape dough as desired, following the manufacturer's instructions. Place cookies on ungreased cookie sheets. Bake at 325°F for 15 minutes. Cool on wire racks. Store in airtight containers with wax paper between layers. Yield: about 7 dozen (2-inch) cookies.
Chocolate-Tipped Butter Cookies:
Melt semisweet chocolate morsels and shortening together. Dip half of each prepared butter cookie in the chocolate mixture, then roll the chocolate-dipped portion in finely chopped pecans. Place cookies on wire racks until chocolate is firm.
